title: A type of humanized smart home network gateway and access method
abstract: This invention discloses a type of humanized smart home network gateway, including smart home access module, Instant Messaging (IM) client module, security module and management module, provides a smart home management method based on IM communication channel. It supports simultaneous connection from multiple smart home appliances through wired or wireless networks to the network gateway, enable users to interactively manage smart home appliance by means of IM conversations. The significance of this invention is: through IM communication channel, user able to have personified management over smart home appliances via means of human to human conversations, and improve the interactive experience between people and smart home.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. A type of humanized smart home network gateway, including: Smart home access module, to connect to smart home appliances; EVI client module, to apply EVI user identity to smart home appliance, enables it to use EVI to interact with users like a human. Security module: to provide security support to smart home access module and IM client module. Management module: to manage settings for the mentioned network gateway. 2. Referring to the "humanized smart home network gateway" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the smart home appliance access module supports wired or wireless network connection to the mentioned network gateway, supports simultaneous connection of 2 and more than 2 smart home appliance to the mentioned network gateway. 3. Referring to the "humanized smart home network gateway" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned EVI client module support 1 or more EVI accounts to register, logon and operate, able to provide an independent account for every smart home appliance, allowing every smart home appliance to become a member of EVI. 4. Referring to the "humanized smart home network gateway" in claim 1 or 3 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned EVI client module provides a management channel based o EVI to the users, users will utilize this channel to manage and acquire the operating status data of smart home appliances via means of EVI conversations. 5. Referring to the "humanized smart home network gateway" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the security module supports authentication based on EVI account of user, to ensure only authorized user able to manage smart home appliances through the mentioned network gateway. 6. Referring to the "humanized smart home network gateway" in claim 1 or 5 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the security module supports authentication based on EVI account of smart home appliances, to ensure only authorized smart home appliance able to access the mentioned network gateway. 7. Referring to the "humanized smart home network gateway" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned management module supports authorized administrator to access the management interface of the mentioned network gateway, to perform safety management to the mentioned network gateway, configure operating parameters of the mentioned network gateway, adding users and smart home appliances. 8. A type of humanized smart home network gateway and access method, the features consisting of: Authorized administrator logon to the mentioned network gateway, adding smart home appliances that are required to logon to the mentioned network gateway; to register an EVI account for every smart home appliance that logon, and associate the account with corresponding smart home appliance; Smart home appliance connects to the mentioned network gateway, and logon after successful authentication; Smart home appliance to logon EVI server with respective EVI account, becomes online EVI member. Authorized administrator logon to the mentioned network gateway, add users to manage smart home appliances; After user logon to EVI server, add smart home appliances to start EVI; The mentioned network gateway authenticate user, upon successful authentication, the user added the smart home appliance successfully; User manage smart home appliances through EVI conversations, smart home appliances feedback to user on the operating status data though EVI conversations as well.
